title: Pipeline Finding
description: A structured finding from the AI Employee Gate pipeline. Each finding has a severity, a recommended action (auto-fix, ask-user, or no-op), and enough context for an AI agent to act on it.

stage.description: Which pipeline stage produced this finding

severity.description: error = blocks merge, warning = needs review, info = informative

action.description: auto-fix = AI agent can safely apply the fix, ask-user = requires human decision, no-op = informational only

file.description: Path to the file that needs fixing (if applicable)

detail.description: Additional detail, diff text, or error output

risk_level.description: Business risk level of this finding

related_case.description: Related golden set case ID (if applicable)

examples.message: priority enum mismatch: schema has low/medium/high/urgent, taxonomy has P1/P2/P3/P4
P1 medical case CS-MED-001 has non-empty suggested_initial_response — auto-reply not suppressed
Policy file changed — requires human review
